beats.title: Asineau Ascendant
beats.boundaryReason: The opening montage covers Robin's appointment, the rebuilding of Asineau, and the party's local political and economic projects before the next major adventure hook arrives.

beats.title: Dragon Rumors East
beats.boundaryReason: Vahaiya's warning about the dragon shifts the session from civic downtime into a new mission, and the beat ends once the party reaches Marwick and gathers the local threat picture.

beats.title: Scouting the Ruins
beats.boundaryReason: This field-investigation beat runs from the ballista plan through scouting the destroyed villages, discovering kobold sign, observing the dragon's route, and returning to complete the trap.

beats.title: Kobolds Take the Cow
beats.boundaryReason: The ruined-village stakeout becomes a contained social-intelligence scene as the party intercepts the kobolds, wins their surrender, learns the factions around the dragon, and settles on an ambush plan.

beats.title: Night Watch
beats.boundaryReason: The final beat is a short cliffhanger in which the party waits outside the lair until Es*tiaslos reports the dragon and its escort approaching after midnight.
